action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer, Wall and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Joers, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Neubauer, Moore Omokunde, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs and Udell
